caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals gathered around a conference table during "Sim Week," as indicated by the text on the screen. The setting appears to be a professional environment, likely a hospital or medical training facility, given the attire and context. The participants, dressed in scrubs and masks, are engaged in a discussion, with papers and mobile devices on the table suggesting they are reviewing case studies or patient information. One individual, seated at the head of the table, seems to be leading the session, while others listen attentively. The atmosphere is focused and collaborative, indicative of a learning or planning session aimed at enhancing clinical skills and teamwork. The "Day 4" label suggests this is part of a multi-day simulation or training program.
